perturbation.original_text: Subject to the terms and conditions set forth herein, Theismann hereby grants to Bizzingo and its affiliates the unlimited right and privilege during the Term (as defined herein) and within the Territory to use the Property (as defined herein) in connection with the advertisement, promotion, and sale of the Network in the Territory whether through film, television, radio, print and Internet media, including the right to use the Property in or on the Network.
perturbation.changed_text: Subject to the terms and conditions set forth herein, Theismann hereby grants to Bizzingo and its affiliates the unlimited right and privilege during the Term (as defined herein) and within the Territory to use the Persona (as defined herein) in connection with the advertisement, promotion, and sale of the Network in the Territory whether through film, television, radio, print and Internet media, including the right to use the Property in or on the Network.
perturbation.explanation: The term 'Property' is initially defined later in the contract to include Theismann's name, likeness, etc. By changing it to 'Persona' in this section but still referencing 'Property' later, we introduce confusion. It's unclear whether Bizzingo's rights extend to everything listed in the definition of 'Property' or just what a 'Persona' might entail, as it's not defined.
perturbation.contradicted_text: Subject to the terms and conditions set forth herein, Theismann hereby grants to Bizzingo and its affiliates the unlimited right and privilege during the Term (as defined herein) and within the Territory to use the Persona (as defined herein) in connection with the advertisement, promotion, and sale of the Network in the Territory whether through film, television, radio, print and Internet media, including the right to use the Property in or on the Network. It being understood and agreed that Bizzingo shall have the right to exhibit commercials, infomercials, advertisements and otherwise make use of all Property on a worldwide basis and that Bizzingo and its affiliates shall be the sole owner of all commercials, promotional materials and other items produced or created hereunder and all related rights worldwide, including, without limitation, copyright, trademark and intellectual property rights, subject however to the terms and conditions herein. Theismann agrees to cooperate with Bizzzingo's promotional efforts in this regard. In addition, as reasonably requested by Bizzingo, Theismann agrees to provide Bizzingo with such signatures, photographs and the like in order to fulfill his obligations hereunder. 1 Source: BIZZINGO, INC., 8-K, 3/22/2012 Bizzingo agrees that any use of the Property for advertising, promotional or sale purposes will be approved in advance by Theismann. Theismann agrees that such material, submitted for approval as provided herein may be deemed by Bizzingo to have been approved hereunder if the same is not disapproved by the Theismann in writing within fourteen (14) days after Theismann's receipt thereof. Theismann agrees that any material submitted hereunder will not be unreasonably disapproved and, if it is disapproved, that Theismann shall advise Bizzingo in writing of the specific grounds therefor at the time of disapproval and provide Bizzingo with specific changes or alterations to such materials. Bizzingo thereafter shall have the right and privileged to use such Property as provided in this Agreement subject to such changes or alterations. Except as stated herein, no other rights or privileges are granted to Bizzingo by Theismann. "Property" as stated herein shall mean Theismann's name (including "Joe Theismann", "Theismann" "J. Theismann"), nicknames, initials, autograph, facsimile signature, photograph, image, likeness, voice, video portrayals, biographical data, character, symbols, and/or other endorsement, and any variations or deviations thereof. "Territory" as stated herein shall mean worldwide.
perturbation.justification: The original text granted rights to 'Property,' explicitly defined later in the contract as Theismann's name, likeness, etc. The changed text grants rights to 'Persona' but still references 'Property' when Bizzingo is allowed to use Property on a worldwide basis. The contradiction arises because 'Persona' is undefined, creating uncertainty regarding Bizzingo's rights. The contradicted text explicitly defines 'Property,' and the change creates confusion about whether Bizzingo's rights extend to everything in that definition or something narrower, which breaks the internal consistency, as the parties' agreement about the scope of Theismann's grant is no longer clear.

perturbation.original_text: For any travel incurred by Theismann as part of his appearances, Bizzingo will provide first class air travel and hotel accommodations.
perturbation.changed_text: For any travel incurred by Theismann as part of his appearances, Bizzingo will provide business class air travel and standard hotel accommodations.
perturbation.explanation: By changing the standard of travel from 'first class air travel and hotel accommodations' to 'business class air travel and standard hotel accommodations', we are creating room for dispute. The contract doesn't define what constitutes 'first class', 'business class' or 'standard' hotel accommodations. This creates uncertainty in the obligation.
perturbation.contradicted_text: Following the execution of this Agreement, Theismann will provide Bizzingo with an availability schedule indicating black out and/or available dates and from time to time will endeavor to update such schedule. In this regard, Bizzingo agrees to provide Joseph Theismann with at least thirty (30) days' written notice of any photographic sessions or public appearances to permit Theismann to properly schedule the session or appearance. Bizzingo will pay all reasonable out of pocket expenses incurred by Theismann in connection with such session or appearance which expenses shall not exceed One Thousand Dollars ($1,000) per day unless Theismann receives prior written approval from Bizzingo. For any travel incurred by Theismann as part of his appearances, Bizzingo will provide business class air travel and standard hotel accommodations.
perturbation.justification: The changed text alters the standard of travel and accommodation, potentially leading to disputes. However, the contradicted text merely reiterates the changed clause. The lack of specific definitions for 'business class' and 'standard' does create uncertainty. However, there isn't a strong in-text contradiction as both sections align in their undefined use of the terms. While the change introduces room for potential disagreement, it doesn't create a direct contradiction with other obligations or definitions within the contract. Therefore, it doesn't meet the threshold for a strong in-text contradiction.

perturbation.original_text: The provisions of the Agreement shall be binding upon and shall inure to the benefit of the Parties hereto, their heirs, administrators, successors and assigns.
perturbation.changed_text: The provisions of the Agreement shall be binding upon and shall inure to the benefit of the Signatories hereto, their heirs, administrators, successors and assigns.
perturbation.explanation: By changing 'Parties' to 'Signatories', we create ambiguity. 'Parties' is defined at the beginning of the contract. 'Signatories' is not. This means it's unclear whether only the people who signed the agreement are bound, or if the definition of 'Parties' (Bizzingo, Inc. and Joseph Theismann) still applies, encompassing the entire company, and potentially Bizzingo's affiliates. This shift from 'Parties' to 'Signatories' could limit the scope of who is bound by the agreement.
perturbation.contradicted_text: THIS AGREEMENT is made as of this March 14, 2012 but effective as of March 1, 2012 ("Effective Date") by and between Bizzingo, Inc., a Nevada corporation with offices at 63 Main Street, Suite 202, Flemington, NJ 08822 ("Bizzingo") and Joseph Theismann, an individual whose address is 21495 Ridgetop Circle, Suite 304A, Sterling Virginia 20166 ("Theismann") (collectively the "Parties"). WITNESSETH: WHEREAS, Theismann is recognized and widely known throughout the world as a retired, hall of fame professional athlete, and sports celebrity; and WHEREAS, Theismann's name, by virtue of his ability and experience, has acquired a meaning in the mind of the purchasing public important to the advertising, promotion, and sale of services and merchandise; and WHEREAS, Bizzingo has developed a B2B interactive platform which engages in business social media including mobile and Internet applications ("Network"); and WHEREAS, Bizzingo is desirous of acquiring the rights to utilize Theismann's name in connection with the advertisement, promotion, and sale of the Network as provided herein and Theismann is willing to grant such right NOW, THEREFORE, in consideration of the mutual covenants set forth herein and for other good and valuable consideration, it is agreed as follows: 1. GRANT OF RIGHTS. Subject to the terms and conditions set forth herein, Theismann hereby grants to Bizzingo and its affiliates the unlimited right and privilege during the Term (as defined herein) and within the Territory to use the Persona (as defined herein) in connection with the advertisement, promotion, and sale of the Network in the Territory whether through film, television, radio, print and Internet media, including the right to use the Property in or on the Network. It being understood and agreed that Bizzingo shall have the right to exhibit commercials, infomercials, advertisements and otherwise make use of all Property on a worldwide basis and that Bizzingo and its affiliates shall be the sole owner of all commercials, promotional materials and other items produced or created hereunder and all related rights worldwide, including, without limitation, copyright, trademark and intellectual property rights, subject however to the terms and conditions herein. Theismann agrees to cooperate with Bizzzingo's promotional efforts in this regard. In addition, as reasonably requested by Bizzingo, Theismann agrees to provide Bizzingo with such signatures, photographs and the like in order to fulfill his obligations hereunder. 1 Source: BIZZINGO, INC., 8-K, 3/22/2012 Bizzingo agrees that any use of the Property for advertising, promotional or sale purposes will be approved in advance by Theismann. Theismann agrees that such material, submitted for approval as provided herein may be deemed by Bizzingo to have been approved hereunder if the same is not disapproved by the Theismann in writing within fourteen (14) days after Theismann's receipt thereof. Theismann agrees that any material submitted hereunder will not be unreasonably disapproved and, if it is disapproved, that Theismann shall advise Bizzingo in writing of the specific grounds therefor at the time of disapproval and provide Bizzingo with specific changes or alterations to such materials. Bizzingo thereafter shall have the right and privileged to use such Property as provided in this Agreement subject to such changes or alterations. Except as stated herein, no other rights or privileges are granted to Bizzingo by Theismann. "Property" as stated herein shall mean Theismann's name (including "Joe Theismann", "Theismann" "J. Theismann"), nicknames, initials, autograph, facsimile signature, photograph, image, likeness, voice, video portrayals, biographical data, character, symbols, and/or other endorsement, and any variations or deviations thereof. "Territory" as stated herein shall mean worldwide.
perturbation.justification: The original text defined 'Parties' as Bizzingo, Inc. and Joseph Theismann. The changed text replaces 'Parties' with 'Signatories'. Since 'Signatories' is not defined, it creates ambiguity about who is bound by the agreement. The contradicted text specifically defines 'Parties' as Bizzingo, Inc. and Joseph Theismann, establishing their roles and responsibilities. The change creates an in-text contradiction because the agreement is explicitly between 'Parties' as defined, but the modified text introduces an undefined term, 'Signatories', potentially limiting the scope of the agreement to just the individuals who signed, instead of the company itself (Bizzingo, Inc.) and Joseph Theismann. This undermines the clear definition of 'Parties' established in the contradicted text and introduces Misaligned Terminology.
